sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n105814" key="*trwofqo/ros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Τρωοφθόρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n105814.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">destructive to the Trojans,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.62</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Even.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
